release_notes: Pivots the Microsoft Store distribution model from 'free download + subscription Add-on' to a one-time paid app at $14.99 USD. The subscription Add-on commerce path was stuck in a persistent PEX-CatalogAvailabilityDataNotFound state on Microsoft's catalog backend that did not respond to any configuration attempted (multiple visibility / audience settings, two Add-on Product IDs, two Microsoft accounts). The paid-app path uses Microsoft Store's standard Get/Buy flow at the listing level and does not depend on the broken Add-on catalog. Removes the welcome / paywall window, the StoreHelper.exe C# helper binary, the .NET 8 build steps from CI, and the winrt-* Python dependencies. Net code reduction is roughly 350 lines plus a deleted directory.
